nasb.text: Again I say to you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 我又告訴你們，駱駝穿過針眼，比有錢的人進　神的國還容易呢！”

ccb.text: 我再告诉你们，骆驼穿过针眼比有钱人进上帝的国还容易呢！”

csbs.text: 我再告诉你们：骆驼穿过针眼，比富有的人进入神的国更容易呢！”
